# Hotel Finder

A high-performance hotel booking site specialized in finding hotels with hot tubs. Built with Next.js and optimized for both SEO and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js (App Router)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Components**: Radix UI / Shadcn UI
- **Icons**: Lucide React
- **Verification**: TypeScript

## Key Content Directories
- `/src/app`: Application routes and pages.
- `/src/components`: UI and Layout components.
- `/src/data`: Structured project data (Hotels, Locations, GEO metadata).

## GEO & SEO Features
- **Sentiment Summaries**: "Verdict" boxes and "Citation Trap" narrative blocks at the top of location guides for AI agents.
- **Entity Mapping**: Dense geographic entities (neighborhoods, landmarks) in overviews.
- **Structured Data**: JSON-LD FAQ schema for rich search results.
- **Vibe-based Comparisons**: Qualitative hotel metrics for better AI citability.

## Accessibility Standards
- All buttons include `aria-label` or accessible names.
- Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards (darkened primary brand color).
- Semantic HTML structure.
